chart.prompt: Anzahl neuer Kunden pro Monat (Kunden deren erste Rechnung in diesem Monat lag), letzte 12 Monate
chart.sql_string:
WITH first_invoice_per_customer AS (
    SELECT
        i.customer_number,
        MIN(i.date) AS first_invoice_date
    FROM invoices i
    LEFT JOIN projects p ON i.project_id = p.project_id
    WHERE i.status NOT IN ('created', 'canceled', 'unknown')
      AND i.customer_number IS NOT NULL
      AND i.date >= DATEADD(month, -11, DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE))
      AND i.date < DATEADD(month, 1, DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE))
      AND ('' = '' OR LOWER(p.abbreviation) = LOWER(''))
    GROUP BY 1
),
monthly_new_customers AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('month', first_invoice_date) AS month_start,
        COUNT(DISTINCT customer_number) AS new_customers
    FROM first_invoice_per_customer
    GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
    TO_CHAR(month_start, 'YYYY-MM') AS "Monat",
    new_customers AS "Anzahl neuer Kunden"
FROM monthly_new_customers
ORDER BY month_start;

en.title: New customers per month
en.description: Customers whose very first invoice was in this month — your acquisition cadence over the last year.

de.title: Neukunden pro Monat
de.description: Kunden deren erste Rechnung in diesem Monat lag — zeigt die Akquise-Kadenz des letzten Jahres.
